benefits.description: Getting leaner to the point where straight injections into lower stomach risk shallow IM instead of subq

side_effects.description: Hard lump at injection site after injecting Tesamorelin; itchiness around injection site more than normal

protocol_notes: OP had been injecting Reta for a few months without issues, then added Tesamorelin approximately 3 weeks prior. Was injecting into lower stomach but started adjusting to 45-degree angle due to reduced body fat. Not rotating injection sites frequently enough.
